Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Pursuant To Stipulation For Reclassification Of Case From Limited To Unlimited Jurisdiction Of Superior Court
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY RAMOS' Motion Of Plaintiff Pursuant To Stipulation For Reclassification Of Case From Limited To Unlimited Jurisdiction Of Superior Court.

Plaintiff Anthony Ramos' motion pursuant to stipulation for reclassification of case from limited to unlimited jurisdiction is granted. No opposition filed and it appears all remaining parties have stipulated to the relief sought by the motion.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Continued To Jul-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
